asset.Name: X-Division for Xenonauts 2
asset.Description:
[ALPHA] Porting the legendary X-Division total conversion mod from Xenonauts 1 to Xenonauts 2.

This project aims to bring X-Division's depth to X2: new weapon lines, alien interrogations, expanded tech trees, and more.

Contributors welcome! GitHub: github.com/IvanCodeCA/X-Division-Xenonauts2

== CURRENT CONTENT ==

Weapons (35 new):
- Plasma: Pistol/Rifle/Shotgun/Sniper/LMG x Mk1/2/3 (Energy, 10-28% ArmPen)
- Gauss Mk3: Pistol/Rifle/Shotgun/Sniper/LMG (Kinetic, 18% ArmPen)
- Antimatter: Pistol/Rifle/Sniper/Cannon/Minigun x Mk1/2/3 (Kinetic, 90% ArmPen)

Interrogations (20 new):
- Psyon/Sebillian/Wraith: Officer, Elite, Leader, Praetorian
- Secton/Andron: Elite, Praetorian
- Mantid: Officer, Elite
- Eternal / High Eternal

== PLANNED ==
- Sonic, Rail, Laser Mk2/3 weapon lines
- New alien types and variants
- Advanced armour tiers
- Balanced economy
- Xenopedia entries

Credits: Original X-Division by Charon and the X-Division team.

Supported game version: 7.18.4+
